heading: Training and technical assistance for entities regarding services provided to veterans at risk of, experiencing, or transitioning out of homelessness
label: 2015 Training and technical assistance for entities regarding services provided to veterans at risk of, experiencing, or transitioning out of homelessness

children.text: the provision of such services to such veterans; and
the planning and development of such services.

children.heading: .—Coordination
children.label: b .—Coordination
children.text: The Secretary may coordinate the provision of training and technical assistance under subsection (a) with the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development and the Secretary of Labor.

children.heading: .—Elements
children.label: c .—Elements
children.text: The training and technical assistance provided under subsection (a) shall include coordination and communication of best practices among all programs administered by the Veterans Health Administration directed at serving veterans at risk of, experiencing, or transitioning out of homelessness.

children.heading: .—Provision of Training
children.label: d .—Provision of Training
children.text: The Secretary may provide the training and technical assistance under subsection (a) directly or through grants or contracts with such public or nonprofit private entities as the Secretary considers appropriate.
